subject: Kikaonde
coverageNote: Form directories exist only where teaching-module source PDFs were ingested. Missing forms must resolve as known-gap, not empty objects.

lesson.title: Isambai ne kwamba lupusano lwatanwamo.
topics: Buwame ne butame buji mu bulumbuluzhi bwa kyambo kya biñambwanembwa.
Anengezhe bulumbuluzhi bwa biñambwanembwa bwa kwingijisha mu
